# @codenhub/validation

> Zero-dependency validation and primitive coercion helpers that return typed
> results instead of throwing for ordinary invalid input. The package is
> experimental.

Use `val` for type-specific constraints, `coerce` for primitive conversion, and
`custom` to normalize consumer-defined validators. Original input is excluded
from failures unless explicitly requested.

## Documentation

- [Documentation overview](docs/index.md): Scope, stability, entrypoint, and
  navigation.
- [Results and coercion](docs/results-and-coercion.md): Error model, result
  helpers, custom validators, and coercion constraints.
- [Validator reference](docs/validators.md): All validator methods, defaults,
  and failure codes.
